products.name: Dolce Gusto
pros: Excellent compatibility with Dolce Gusto machines

products.name: Nespresso
pros: Highest score in Altroconsumo's quality assessment
Wide range of flavors and blends
Strong brand reputation for espresso quality

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo, Assoutenti APS. Altroconsumo's March 2025 capsule coffee test lists Dolce Gusto and Nespresso as the best‑rated brands, providing fresh evidence of their quality and price performance.
videoSource: Migliori Capsule Caffè : marche e prezzi
